summary: Crisp PCM soundboard recording captures a stellar 1984 Ventura show with scorching Scarlet > Fire, Midnight Hour and an unforgettable second set.
review: The tape delivers exceptionally clean, low‑hiss PCM audio (though a few listeners note occasional channel reversal and minor pitch/treble quirks). Musically the performance is praised as one of ’84’s highlights – especially the second‑set jams, tight transitions and standout moments like Scarlet > Fire, Midnight Hour, Morning Dew and “Loser.”

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show and recording highly; a few note minor technical glitches, giving an overall strong but not flawless impression.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very clean PCM sound with virtually no hiss; some users report channel reversal and a half‑step pitch/treble anomaly on Midnight Hour/Brokedown Palace, plus occasional distortion in spots.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers rave about the seamless transitions and a second set that builds momentum, citing superb jams from Percussion → Improvisation → Morning Dew and tight segues like Scarlet > Fire.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Playing is solid despite a slight cold; guitar work praised as 'fine' and energetic, with no major drop‑outs.
